feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change language SAP ECC6
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I installed sap ecc6 ehp6 with db ase. Currently I only have English and German. Which package should I download and install to obtain the Italian language?

Thank you

entry.title: Price modification at MRKO settlement time
entry.content:
We have a requirement to modify the amount at the time of MRKO settlement and settlement amount should post into Price difference G/L account.


Is there any way to modify amount during settlement (MRKO) and is it possible to modify the amount along price difference account? Could you please check and suggest possibilities to make this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Backflush of valuated material on a production order
entry.content:
Hello. We have created a production order type, assigned a BOM and a routing and confirmed the production of the material. For some reason the material posting for the finished part is done without value, even so the material is valuated (by standard price). 
Thanks for any idea. Kind Regards, Hansi

entry.title: AP contract report details
entry.content:
Dear team,

 

I need report which contained below information.

Vendor

Contract

Contract invoice

Payments

Closing balance of every invoice.

I used several reports in order to get information.But there is a  problem i coulnd find any report which show only payments YFIMM_REPORT to contracts but i could get a list.i I have to write per contract numbers i need list.Also i couldnt find invoices under which contract reports.

Could anyone help me?

Thank is advance

entry.title: GST IN : DCS : eDocument for Proforma Invoices in GST Reporting Node
entry.content:
GST IN : DCS : eDocument for Proforma Invoices in GST Reporting Node


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Different output messages in MIRO for Vendor and Payer
entry.content:
Is it possible to create 2 output messages in MIRO, one for the PO Vendor and another for the Payer? In our process, sometimes the vendor is different from the payer, and the PDF document should be sent to the vendor also.

I have configured 2 different output types: Z001 for the Vendor and Z002 for the Payer (I have included a condition for Z001 not to be printed if the vendor and payer are the same).

The configuration in NACE appears to be correct, and I've assigned the correct partner for each condition in MRM1.

If this cannot be achieved through configuration, do you know if changing the partner via the user exit userexit_komkbmr_fill will allow me to achieve my goal?

entry.title: SAP Easy Access - Menu Text missing
entry.content:
Users are unable to identfiy the transaction to be used as the text display on the easy menu when missing.

Not only its affecting the easy menu, ALV report and any menu disply in tree structure are affected too.

Anyone having such issue. BTW, I'm using SAP ECC 6 EHP6. SAP Logon Pad 800

entry.title: No operations found for order routing number &1." when posting a goods issue for a production order.
entry.content:
Dear All,

Getting the below error while Possting Goods Issue to Production Order

Message - Error message C2445

entry.title: S/4HANA Data export of large data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am looking for a way to extract all postings over the last years from SAP S4HANA (Transaction: JP5). It should be data from all subsidiaries. Because of the large amount of data, a traditional export leads to a system crash.

The reason is that I want to analyze the bookings and search for specific words in the booking like "restructuring". 

Anyone has an idea how I could be able to solve this? Or another way how I can do textual analysis in SAP?

Best regards

Mahdi

 

Basis Technology

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2210 - Goods Issue - UOM Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are in the process of enabling the Inventory Clerk persona in the SSAM 2210 application. As part of that, we are facing an issue when we post the Goods Receipt/Good Issue against PO/Reservation from the mobile application.

'Unit ST is not created in language EN' - If post from device where we have language set as Danish.

'Unit PC is not created in language DA'- If post from device where we have language set as English

Can you please help us on this?

entry.title: Packaging material items created although TVTY-KZPGN initial
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am facing the following issue: We are generating packaging material items from handling units in outbound deliveries. For some packaging materials, we don't want to generate items. Hence, we are using packaging material types where we leave the field TVTY-KZPGN blank. As far as I understand the documentation for this field, no items should be generated if it is blank. However, the system still creates those items.

Any experience with this? Any solution proposals?

Thanks and best regards, Michael

entry.title: Ocultar pestañas de la barra superior
entry.content:
Hola buenos días me gustaría saber si puedo ocultar algunas de estás pestañas, por ejemplo la de "Módulos" o que los módulos de esa pestaña se puedan parametrizar como como la ventana que tenemos al lado izquierdo. ¡Saludos!

Hello, good morning, I would like to know if I can hide some of these tabs, for example the "Modules" one or that the modules of that tab can be parameterized like the window we have on the left side. Greetings!

entry.title: Revise Standard cost estimate for Q stock
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to check if it's possible to revise standard cost estimate for existing Q stock or Project stock. Thanks.

Regards

Henry

entry.title: Replacement for Function CREDIT_EXPOSURE
entry.content:
I'm looking for the replacement function for CREDIT_EXPOSURE in SAP HANA Systems, where CREDIT_EXPOSURE still reads from the old tables. 
UKM_MALUSLIST_PROCESSING looks promising and provides some data, but misses OPEN_* return parameters.
Any hints or strategies how to find them appreciated.

entry.title: Dump when running Transaction FR04
entry.content: We use Former Budgeting . We try to change the Orignal Budget for year 2024 by using Transaction FR04, and after posting we get a message that "Update was terminated", and the proram is "DUMPED".

entry.title: PP - Planning Calendars GR vs AVL Date
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, recently i had a request to activate the planning, Calendars. 

 

The original request is, how do I set up the MRP to receive the POs on specific days of the week??, for instance this list of materials I only want to receive it on Monday.

 

We set up the Planning Calendars and they are working fine, however we discovered that the requirements are align to the calendar but only the Availability date is aligned to the calendar, not the GR Date.

 

(The Calendar in the example the period is only Monday) 

 

if I check it against the calendar everything is matching to Monday. (Except one day, but is because Monday is a holiday, so it is moving it to the next day) 

 

However, if I change the view to display the GR Date, the GR Date is simply AV-GR days in the material master. 

 

Are you aware of a method to consider the GR not the availability date using the planning calendar? 

 

This is the current set up of the lot size used in the example.

 

An easy change would be to remove the GR time and add it to the plan delivery time, however they want to keep the GR time. 

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Enhancement for transaction VK12
entry.content:
Hi All,

I Create a implicit Enhance at the end of
FORM RV13A_KSCHL_SCHNELL in INCLUDE MV13AF0R,
I want to set the value of field KBSTAT as blocked when conditions change.

I successfully set the field, but normally when KBSTAT is set,
KRFST should also be set, but it is not.

Please Help me! Thanks All !

Best regards,

entry.title: need suggetion for upgrade HANA version
entry.content:
Hi experts,

  We are using S4HANA ON PREMISE SAP S/4HANA 1809 and datebase  2.00.037.07.1595989006 ( fa/hana2sp03 ) , detail can be found in the screenshot. Currently, we are experiencing the issue mentioned in  NOTE 0002940750 - Column Store DML Statements Waiting for DeltaDataObjectAppendRollover Lock. It seems the better solution is to upgrade HANA database version to 2.054.00 (SPS05) or higher. 

  Our concern here is that the current version of HANA has already reached SPS07, with many versions in between. Which version would be the best choice or the most stable option for us this time? Additionally, if we only upgrade the database without upgrading S/4HANA, will there be any compatibility issues? We hope the experts can provide some advice.

  Thank you very much.

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: SAP ECC compliance with XMLv2 revision 14 for SWIFT Alliance Lite2
entry.content:
Dear Team  ,

  I need help on how to change SWIFT message generation format in  SAP ECC to comply the new XMLv2 revision 14  .This is meet an urgent regulatory requirement  .Please assist relevant process or SAP note(s) .
